title: rhabdophyllum thonneri
intro: Rhabdophyllum thonneri, a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, is a woody vine native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help to reduce pain and prevent infection. The health benefits of Rhabdophyllum thonneri are thought to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
